code: import apiClient from'./apiClient';const predictionService={predict:async payload=>{const response=await apiClient.post('/predict',payload);return response.data;},predictStudent:async studentId=>{const response=await apiClient.post('/predict',{studentId});return response.data;},getHistory:async()=>{const response=await apiClient.get('/predictions/history');return response.data.predictions;},getLeaderboard:async()=>{const response=await apiClient.get('/leaderboard');return response.data.records;}};export default predictionService;
